revision.comment: [[Template:EstcatContinent]] now needs no parameters. It creates poartl links where appropriate., replaced: {{EstcatContinent|142|9|Asia}} → {{EstcatContinent}}
revision.text: {{EstcatContinent}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
revision.text: {{EstcatContinent}}

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Removing from [[Category:Refreshing categories falsely categorized as uncategorized]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:Supercategory 2]]" to ""
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT\:[^]]+}}" to ""
Bot: remove self-membership
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Bot: remove obsolete category 11 fixed
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: tidy cats/interwikis, add JA text & EN link
revision.text:
{{EstcatContinent}} {{draft categories|
}} [[Category:Categories with 2 members]] [[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[en:1429 establishments in Asia]] [[en:Category:1429 establishments in Asia]] [[ja:1429 establishments in Asia]] [[Category:Categories with 2 members]] [[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 2 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs, add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: remove empty section(s)
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}↵" to ""
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{EstcatContinent}}
==Categories==
[[en:1429 establishments in Asia]] [[en:Category:1429 establishments in Asia]] [[ja:1429 establishments in Asia]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Original categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q24076051)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1429_establishments_in_Asia here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1429_establishments_in_Asia for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--templates--> {{EstcatContinent}} {{wikidata link|Q24076051}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:1429 establishments in Asia]] [[en:Category:1429 establishments in Asia]] [[ja:1429 establishments in Asia]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Emmabot categories with enwiki]]
